claim: Session 14 populate-pass outcome: Colab A100 run of notebooks/populate_tier1_cache.ipynb committed three Tier-1 parquets + a manifest.json update to cell_sim/features/cache/ as commit ebbfdff on branch claude/syn3a-whole-cell-simulator-REjHC. ESM-2 landed real 1280-dim embeddings for all 455 Syn3A CDS (zero NaN). AlphaFold-DB and MACE-OFF parquets landed empty by design — documented data-availability gaps, not extraction bugs. FeatureRegistry SHA-verifies all three and join_features returns correctly-shaped blocks.
source_detail: Commit ebbfdff on claude/syn3a-whole-cell-simulator-REjHC. SHAs recomputed in-sandbox via hashlib streaming over each parquet and cross-checked against cell_sim/features/cache/manifest.json. FeatureRegistry.load() passes SHA validation for all three sources; FeatureRegistry.join_features() on a 3-locus query returns a (3, 1296) DataFrame with correct NaN handling for an unknown locus_tag.

esm2_650M.content_status: real embeddings for every Syn3A CDS; full information content
esm2_650M.gpu_used: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition (95 GB VRAM)

alphafold_db.content_status: empty by design — JCVI-Syn3A (taxid 2144189) has no UniProt proteome; 4 UniProt query routes all returned zero rows
alphafold_db.session_15_todo: wire in a curated NCBI-protein-accession -> UniProt mapping (candidate: Luthey-Schulten 4DWCM supplement)

mace_off_kcat.content_status: empty by design — Syn3A SBML uses BiGG species IDs not SMILES; notebook cell 7 HAVE_CURATED_SMILES_MAP=False guard skips the backend entirely
mace_off_kcat.session_15_todo: wire in a curated species -> SMILES map (candidates: KEGG, ChEBI) and flip HAVE_CURATED_SMILES_MAP to True

downstream_contract_check.FeatureRegistry_load_esm2_650M: ok — returns (455, 1280) DataFrame indexed by locus_tag
downstream_contract_check.FeatureRegistry_load_alphafold_db: ok — returns (455, 9) DataFrame indexed by locus_tag
downstream_contract_check.FeatureRegistry_load_mace_off_kcat: ok — returns (455, 7) DataFrame indexed by locus_tag
downstream_contract_check.FeatureRegistry_join_features_3_loci: ok — returns (3, 1296) with correct NaN for unknown locus JCVISYN3A_9999

caveats: Two of three sources are empty-by-design. Any Session-15 classifier built on these features is effectively an ESM-2-only classifier until AlphaFold-DB and MACE-OFF parquets are refilled with curated mappings.

No MCC measurement is claimed. This fact records a populate-pass outcome only. The first honest MCC number on Tier-1 features comes in a follow-up session and gets recorded as mcc_against_breuer_v11_tier1.json (or similar).
Zero pretrained weights were committed to the repo. ESM-2 and MACE-OFF weights were pulled from HuggingFace Hub at Colab runtime; AFDB PDBs were never fetched because no UniProt IDs were resolvable.
Reproduction: re-run notebooks/populate_tier1_cache.ipynb on any Colab GPU runtime. ESM-2 deterministic (same SHA expected); the other two remain empty until curated mappings land.
